message: She was trying to give me a signal with her eyes...
Her eyes were yelling at me to run away.
But then she looked back at the camera and gave them a big smile so they wouldn't notice.

name: Kimika
message: "Aha... You think so? This is embarrassing."
She's not acting normal... There's no way she would give in that easily.

name: Kimika
message: "I'll take the initiative. I'll try to draw their attention. All you have to do is run."
She's doing this so I can run away.
But I can't leave Kimika behind... I could never run off and abandon her...
I can't go along with what they're trying to do.
At this rate... it'll end up just like before...
Even if I go along with them... I won't be bullied like I was before.
If I just act like they want, I won't have to go through the same experiences as before.
They won't trample me like a worm, they won't tear me in half, they won't laugh at my suffering.
If I go along with them...
I'll be no better than a worm.
Do I really want to go back to being a bug trampled underfoot?
The worm writhing on the other side of the mirror...
That's not me... That's a worm writhing somewhere in the distance.
But the truth is... it's no different.
The worm writhing within the mirror... is me.
No, it's not even writhing within the mirror. It simply reflects my pitiful state.
My form... reflected in the mirror.
I am a swordsman... I am a poet... I am a philosopher. I am... I am... I am...

name: Zakuro
message: "But... who fights ever hoping for success?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I fought for lost cause, and for fruitless quest!"

name: Satoko
message: "What? She's talking to herself. That's creepy..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You there, who are you! ―You are thousands!... Ah! I know you now, old enemies of mine!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Have at you! Ha! and Compromise! Prejudice, Treachery!..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Surrender, I? Parley? No, never! You too, Folly,―you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I know that you will lay me low at last; Let be! Yet I fall fighting, fighting still!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry! I just remembered I have somewhere I need to be! And I need to talk to Kimika!"
I forcibly pulled Kimika by the arm and ran away.
She almost tripped and fell as we ran... She yelled something at me, but I couldn't hear her.
I could think of nothing more than putting one foot in front of the other.
I recited the lines from the play I borrowed from Mamiya-kun.
I repeated them and repeated them... like I was praying for something.
I whispered the lines as I ran.
My left cheek stung. Oh, I was slapped. Which means... Huh? Why is Kimika angry?
I'd never seen this expression before. It didn't look like she was angry. It looked more like she was... crying?
Ahahahahaha... I guess I did something silly again. All I did was upset her, huh...
She wanted me to run away while she distracted them.
She would've been happy being bullied if it meant I got away...

name: Zakuro
message: "I did this through my own will, Kimika."

name: Zakuro
message: "I didn't want to go along with what they wanted, so I thought about what I could do."

name: Zakuro
message: "Even I could understand what they were doing... They wanted to film us doing nasty things and sell it."

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you saying, Kimika... You're the one being stupid now."

name: Zakuro
message: "I wouldn't want that... I wouldn't want to be saved if it meant you had to go through that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Starting tomorrow, they'll probably bully us like they used to, but... I think that's better than leaving you behind."

name: Zakuro
message: "You were the one who said it, Kimika."

name: Zakuro
message: "Guilt... Guilt is crueler than any bully. I don't want to be saved if it means sacrificing you... I would never want that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Even if I was saved, I would die of regret... It would be more painful than anything a bully could ever do to me."

name: Kimika
message: "You really have changed in the past few days."

name: Kimika
message: "When you were a kid, and later when we met up again at Kita High, you were always too timid to speak up when someone did something you didn't like... and now you're brave enough to do what you just did."

name: Kimika
message: "And... what were you saying earlier? I sounded like you were reciting an incantation or something."

name: Zakuro
message: "It wasn't an incantation... It was a quote from a play called Cyrano de Bergerac ."
Oh, I see. So it really was because of Mamiya Takuji."
Anyway, you should be careful... though it's probably futile at this point."
Kimika turned and looked away from me.
She said that, and then she left.
The shopping district was still full of people.
Kimika and I went our separate ways.
Though I was scared for a little while there, I'm not anymore.
After that, I went up to the department store roof.
Maybe I wanted to look at the sky... or maybe I couldn't stand being in the crowd.
Maybe I just wanted to find a quiet place to sit.
Since this is where I met him.
I found my conviction as I stood under that sky.

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha... Not at all. You're the person I lent that book to."

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course it is... I wish you would remember it."
Mamiya-kun held a can of pop out toward me.

name: Mamiya
message: "You look like you're sweating... Shouldn't you replenish your fluids?"
I took the can from him.

name: Mamiya
message: "What are you doing here at this time of night? Running a marathon?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? No one would run a marathon in their school uniform..."

name: Mamiya
message: "You're in the same year as me, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehe... You should be able to remember that."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's not entirely true. You see, it's not good for your brain..."

name: Mamiya
message: "But it is good for your spirit."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? It seems like it would be bad for your spirit too..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Let me amend that statement. Smoking is good for the spirit that's not good to begin with."

name: Mamiya
message: "You already finished it? You're really fast."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha... You're the one who said you kept reading it over because it ends too soon."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, it was really good... and it gave me courage."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Ahahaha... That's kind of strange, isn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... I just meant, maybe you think I'm a pathetic girl because of that..."

name: Mamiya
message: "There's not a single person that isn't pathetic. People just hide their pain."

name: Mamiya
message: "If you're pathetic, then so am I. You could even call me a bit pitiful."

name: Zakuro
message: "If even you are pathetic, then... what kind of person isn't?"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's a good question, and the answer is..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I've never met anyone that wasn't, so I wouldn't know."

name: Mamiya
message: "I wonder where that person is hiding. There has to be a wonderful person like that somewhere in the world, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Cyrano's words have a certain rhythm to them..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Anyone capable of reason would be encouraged by his panache."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah. At the end, Cyrano screams out the word 'panache' as he dies."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... 'You strip from me the laurel and the rose!'"

name: Mamiya
message: "'Take all! Despite you there is yet one thing I hold against you all, and when, to-night, I enter Christ's fair courts, and, lowly bowed,"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sweep with doffed casque the heavens' threshold blue, one thing is left, that, void of stain or smutch, I bear away despite you.'"

name: Mamiya
message: "The last thing he tried to take with him was 'mon panache'... In other words, his white plume."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, the white plume on his hat."

name: Mamiya
message: "Apparently the word came to mean something closer to 'A flamboyant manner.'"

name: Mamiya
message: "In other translations you'll see the final line translated as 'My white plume.'"

name: Mamiya
message: "He says those words as death takes everything else from him. Isn't that cool?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It gives me chills to think of him crying out the three syllables of 'Mon panache!' at the moment of his death..."

name: Mamiya
message: "If the kind of person who could witness his final moments without feeling something, the kind of person who would call you pathetic for doing so..."

name: Mamiya
message: "If that's the kind of person that isn't 'pathetic,' then I'd rather be pathetic."

name: Zakuro
message: "C-Could I borrow it... for just a little while longer?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? I don't really mind, but... why?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, you just recited that one part. You must have read it a lot."

name: Mamiya
message: "But the prose is really beautiful, isn't it? Cyrano is a poet, after all..."

name: Zakuro
message: "The way he talks is really cool, isn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Now that I think about it... Why are you here at this time of night, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I see you on the rooftop a lot."

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess you're right... I feel like I'm suffocating when I'm inside."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah. The higher the ceiling, the better..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, the higher the better... and it feels best when it's infinitely high, you know?"

name: Mamiya
message: "At first, I hated the endless sky... People really change, huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I used to like the rain. I loved rain clouds."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? Then how did that change? Why do you like the endless sky now?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Who knows... A lot of people tell me I ramble on about a lot of boring stuff, so I tend to frustrate them."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not true. The endless sky. That sounds nice."

name: Mamiya
message: "Sometimes when someone says something ridiculous like that, he's actually serious."
I drank from the can that he gave me.
The sweet, carbonated flavor filled my mouth.
And that's how I came to stand here...
Looking at the eternal sky with Mamiya-kun.
The two of us... looking at the night sky...
He was still looking up at the sky.
I might lose everything I have, but...
But if I can hold onto my panache...
